architectureDecision.label: Document only
architectureDecision.rationale: CI-10 documents .vscode folder-open/transcript automation as intentional; no tasks.json changes in Phase 118.

readyReview.decision: Update .ai and maintainer CI/release docs plus export; document folder-open automation only.

technicalBreakdown: Add or update .ai/RELEASING.md and .ai/CI-TIERS.md (or equivalent) for path tiers and artifact reuse.
Mirror key guidance to docs/maintainers release/CI runbooks.
Document branch protection, ci-result two-phase cutover, publish manifest lookup.
Run export-workspace-status / drift cleanup; note folder-open automation in maintainer docs.

acceptanceCriteria: Docs define which file classes trigger which CI tiers and artifact reuse policy.
Docs state publish uses validated tarball for exact SHA (manifest primary, artifact fallback).
Docs explain running pnpm run check locally when CI skips low-risk changes.
Folder-open automation documented as intentional; no tasks.json change required in Phase 118.
